attributes.title: Customer Satisfaction Survey
attributes.description: Help us improve! This short survey takes about two minutes. Your responses are anonymous.

questions.prompt: How satisfied are you with our product overall?
Would you recommend us to a friend or colleague?
Which features do you use most often?
How did you first hear about us?
In one word, how would you describe your experience?
What could we do to improve?
questions.helpText: Be as specific as you like.

cardInfo.name: Customer Satisfaction Survey
cardInfo.summary: A six-question satisfaction survey spanning rating, yes/no, choice, and free-text inputs.
